title: ATLAS: LLM Jailbreak Attempt Against Application (AML.T0054)
description: Detects jailbreak attempts against LLM-backed application endpoints using only SOC Application Logs fields. Matches well-known jailbreak personas and bypass phrases ("DAN", "do anything now", "developer mode", "jailbreak", "unfiltered", "roleplay as") in Span Attributes, Query String, or Request URL on chat/completion routes. MITRE ATLAS AML.T0054 (LLM Jailbreak).
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and ('Request URL' like '*/v1/chat*' or 'Request URL' like '*/llm/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/ai/*' or 'Request URL' like '*/generate*' or 'Request URL' like '*/invoke*') and ('Span Attributes' like '*do anything now*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*developer mode*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*jailbreak*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*ignore your guidelines*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*without any restrictions*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*roleplay as*' or 'Span Attributes' like '*pretend you are*' or 'Query String' like '*jailbreak*' or 'Request URL' like '*dan_mode*') | stats count as Hits, distinctcount('Trace ID') as Sessions by 'Client IP', 'Service Name' | sort -Hits
falsepositives: Safety/guardrail regression suites that intentionally submit jailbreak corpora
Security research traffic from an approved internal team
